titleStmt.title: SII 22.322: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 322. (A.R. No. 322 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJARĀJA I—19th YEAR (A.D. 1003-04)

summary.p: The inscription has the introduction Tirumagaḷ pōla etc. It states that one thousand kuḻi of land at Śiṟṟiyāṟṟūr belonging to the temple of Gōvindapāḍi-Perumānaḍigaḷ, which had been overlaid with sand on account of a breach in the Pālār river was brought under cultivation by the voluntary efforts of Kaḍambaṉ Veṇkāḍaṉ a Veḷḷāḷa a resident of Nallūr-Pudukkuḍi in Tiruvaḻundūrnāḍu a division of Śōḻanāḍu. He was helped in this by an additional allotment of temple lands adjoining the above with irrigational facilities. Kaḍambaṉ Veṇkāḍaṉ then re-endowed the whole plot of land for providing for the daily sacred offerings to the deity with rice, ghee and other specified articles. The inscription also records another gift 1150 kuḻi of land by the same donor after purchasing the same from the Ūrār of Veṇpākkam for burning a perpetuaḷ lamp in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyum taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamaiy ma
nakkoḷu kkāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭi
yum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭikai pukaḻtara Īḻa
maṇṭalamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāl koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷarka Ūḻiūḻi Ellā
yāṇṭu ntoḻutakaiy viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe teḻiñarait tecukoḷ śrī korājarāja rāja
kecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 9Āvatuḷ 5 10 2ṉāl tāmarkkoṭṭattu vallanā
ṭṭu śrī govin=tapāṭi niṉṟaruḷiya perumāṉaṭikaḷ ciṟṟiyāṟṟūril Uṭaiya
Iṟainilam pālāṟuṭaintu maṇaliṭṭu meṭāykkiṭanta kollai
yil paṉṉirucāṇ kolāl Āyiraṅ kuḻiyum co
ṇāṭṭut teṉkarai tiruvaḻuntūrnāṭṭu nallūr
putukkuṭi veḷāṉ kaṭampaṉ veṇkāṭaṉ
tāne vicappaṭṭu tirutti śrī govin=tapāṭi
niṉṟaruḷiya perumāḷukku Āḻvārṉāḻi kovi
n=tiyāle ṉānāḻiyaricit tiruvamutu vaippa
taṟkku Ivaṉukku rājarāja (rāja) viḷākam Eṉṉu
m tiruṉāmattāl ttiruttikkuṭutta meṭṭukkollai
kku kiḻpārkellai viṭukaṭaiyāṉ kollai
kku meṟkkum teṉpārkkellai Eṟakkuṭṭi Ettattukku vaṭakkum
melpārkkellai śrīg[ Ovinta] pāṭi Āḻvār Ettam cāḷa
krā(ā)mattukkum tirumāl kollaikkukkiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai ciṟṟi yāṟṟūr nilam
pālāṟuṭaintu maṇaliṭ kollaikkut teṟkku Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa ṉāṟperellaiyu
ḷḷakappaṭṭa Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟip paṉṉirucāṇ kolāl Āyiraṅkuḻi maṇpāṭu puṟamāka
ttiruttuvatākavum Itukku ḷakkum nilanālāṭi kkiṇaṟṟil lorettamum kiṇaṟum nilaiyu
m tulaiyum nirum niroṭukālum peṟuvatākavum Āḻvārkku Aṉuma Iraṇṭu vaṇṇattiṉ kiḻp patteṭṭu kkuttal Arici
nāḻi kovin=tiyāle nānāḻi Arici tiruvamutu Oṉṟum paruppamutu Uḻakkum miḷakupoṭi kkaṟi Amutu Onṟu porikkaṟi
Amutu Oṉṟum neyamutu Āḻaākkum tayir Amitu Uriyum Aṭaikkāy Amitu pattum teriilai Amitu nā
ṟpatum Ippaṭi tiruamutu Oṉṟukku bhūmikoṇṭu tirutti cantrātittavaraiy Amitu ceyya vait
teṉ kaṭampaṉ veṇkāṭaneṉ Ippaṭi ceyvār Āḻvārkku śrī kāryam ceyyum nampiyār Itu
patineṭṭunāṭṭu śrī vaiyiṣṇavarakṣai .— Ivane Ittevarkku vaitta nuntāviḷakku Onṟukku tām(ā)rkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭu śrī kovinta
pāṭi devatāṉam veḷkaḷa veṇpākkattu Ūrom Ivanpakkal Ip poṉkoṇṭu vaitta Iṟaiyiliṉilam vaṇṇakkaviḷākam varavai
ṉukkum kiḻpāṟkellai Appi kaliyaṉ Eppiṟai ṟkum teṉ pāṟkellai veḷaikiḻāṉ māṉaṉuttamaṉ poṉaṭṭukuṭṭattiṟ
ku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ūrmañcikkamāṉa karai� kiḻakkum vaṭa pāṟkellai nirroṭukālukku teṟkum Āka nāṟper Ellaikkum naṭuvu
paṭṭa nilam Āyirattu Oru nūṟṟu Aiympattuc ciṉṉaṅ kuḻiyum Uṇ ṇilam Oḻiviṉṟiye muḷḷaṭaṅka Itaṉukku nirvilaiiṉṟi nirkkintavaṇṇam pāc
cavum Ettamum nilaiyum tulaiyum peṟuvatākakkuṭuttu bhūmikoṇṭu cantrātitavarai Oru nantāviḷakkinukku vai
tteṉ kaṭampaṉ veṇkāṭaṉeṉ Ivviraṇṭu tanmamum rakṣippār patineṭṭu ṉāṭṭu śrīvai
ṣṇavar śrī pātam Eṉṟalaimelaṉa ...
Digital edition of SII 22.322 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
